column1: whats good bro checkin in. hows the squad feelin about the options
Still waiting to see who all is down. Hopefully will know by the end of the day and will shoot you a text asap
ok word lmk, def wanna get y'all locked in before things sell out
Yo man sorry it took a little while but i got a group for sure for 3 of us and possibly 4 depending on what the total cost would be.
bet! do you still have the email i sent over? has all the pricing for 3/4 person rooms
and i can try to help you find a good flight, where you flying out of?
Yeah i still have the email. Do we need to book it through the link? We are probably going to fly out of new orleans because the flights are alot cheaper.
Also the link only opens the 4 night stay option. We were looking to do the same 5 night stay that our buddies are doing if possible.
Sup bro, for Punta Cana? Was it March 7-12
aight bet. I can make a reservation for y'all, were you ready to get it secured tonight
Yeah tonight or tomorrow. Do you happen to know the full price per person for 5 nights for 4 people?
And that includes everything but the flight?
wont have to spend any money while out there
Awesome. Does it include parties and events at the resort also?
yup you get to slide to all of our on-resort parties bro. pool party, beach party, and resort nightclub nights
there is an off resort party pass which is a separate add on
Perfect. Letting them know and will hopefully have an answer by tonight. How much extra is the extra party pass and are you able to get the off resort party pass after arriving?
yea I would recommend doing it before arriving, but you can do it after booking the base stay. like you have up to 48 hours before you leave to add it to your account
I have a bundle deal, 3 events for 200
Ok wait sorry so you can buy it there? Also do we all have to pay at the same time to book or do we have a day to all pay?
it doesnt have to be exactly at the same time but within the same day yea for sure. everyone gets their own account and makes their own payments
and yes you can buy the party pass there when you arrive. I def recommend getting it beforehand tho
Ok sounds great. Can we set it all up tomorrow? Some of our parents are asleep now
for sure bro. all good I'll send it over in the morning
whats your last name for the reservation?
fire, which school we from again?
got you! bet bro will send this for the morning. is it 3 or 4 ppl now
sup bro making this now! 4 people?
Yo man i just talked to one of my friends and they just found out they cant make it. Is it possible to swap to a three person if I have already paid and everything?
Ok awesome thank you. Do the other ones just pay through the same link still?
yessir just send them the link
yoyo, your boys plan on hopping in? operations is asking
Yes sorry. Should be all paid by this afternoon
got it, will let them know
yo my dog, we literally just had things sell out for your dates. since we didnt have the others slotted in to confirm the room we werent able to do so before it sold out
would you be cool with doing the 11th to 15th?
Shit. I already have booked my flights.
ahhh man, was it within 24 hours?
No just over. I booked them yesterday at 1
got you. lets weigh out the options
1) We can do Weds 11th to Sat 14th, 3 nights. and you'd get reimbursed the balance. if your airline would be alright with switching or be able to honor credit
2) We can cancel the reservation and get you refunded fully for the 799 you paid
3) we skip class on the 15th lol
Does the other resort have any availability for the original dates?
will check on that now bro
Awesome thank you. They all rather go at the beginning of the week rather then the end so anything or any earlier would be ideal.
Hey bro so it's lookin like our other options are also not available til the 11th that week
There were a bunch of groups that switched from Cancun to Punta Cana and fully booked on those dates
Yeah thanks man everyone is just wanting to do something else now so i will needa just get a refund on the trip.
okay word bro I'll get that processed
yessir should be in progress now
sorry it sold out so quickly bro
